column1: # HOT-PATHS.tsv — machine-read manifest for the hardening-gate + kani-gate CI jobs (roadmap items 6 & 7).
# Parser: scripts/hardening-gate.sh (mode=lib/dudect) and scripts/kani-gate.sh (mode=kani), both awk -F tab.
# Read CHECKLIST.md for the standing law.
# @ZONE lines designate an algorithmic hot ZONE (path prefix). A diff that touches a file
# under a zone with NO data row below = RED (new algorithmic code must register itself).
#   path_prefix  features  filter  min_tests  mode  checklist  gap
#   path_prefix : changed file matches this row iff its path starts with path_prefix
#   features    : cargo features for the test/proof run ("-" = default)
#   filter      : SINGLE-token filter. mode=lib/dudect → cargo test filter (module path);
#                 mode=kani → cargo kani --harness <filter> (substring of the harness path).
#                 Multi-token filters match ZERO tests, so every row uses one substring.
#   min_tests   : mode=lib/dudect → gate asserts (parsed "N passed") >= min_tests.
#                 mode=kani → asserts (parsed "N successfully verified harnesses") >= min_tests.
#                 A floor. Zero-match = RED (deleting/renaming a test/harness cannot stay green).
#                 min_tests=0 on a kani row = placeholder obligation (diff-visible warning, no floor
#                 yet) — used for a future item's harness that does not exist on this branch yet.
#                 kani   = cargo kani [--features F] --harness <filter>   (RUN BY kani-gate.sh,
#                          SKIPPED by hardening-gate.sh — separate job: network toolchain + minutes)
#   gap         : ledgered missing/deferred coverage, owner-tagged; "-" = none
